title: Is there a way to create notification 3 weeks ahead of date?
excerpt: I have used the automation which allows me to notify a user when a date arrives or has past but is there a way to customize a notification to earlier? We have items with insurance that carry expirations that we need to b…

posts.author: zkendall (Zack Kendall)
posts.cookedHtml: I have used the automation which allows me to notify a user when a date arrives or has past but is there a way to customize a notification to earlier? We have items with insurance that carry expirations that we need to be notified of 3 weeks prior so we can reach out and get updated files from client.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: You can in the “when date arrives” select when it notifies you, and you can do 3 weeks before as an option within that.
